site.name: Khiet Lam
site.eyebrow: Independent portfolio / Ho Chi Minh City
site.headline: Editorial thinking across culture, brands and publishing.
site.intro: I research, write, edit and curate stories that connect cultural knowledge, contemporary audiences and distinctive brand voices.
site.about: Khiet Lam is an editor, senior copywriter and cultural event curator based in Ho Chi Minh City. His practice moves between editorial research, publishing, brand language, interviews and public programmes.

projects.title: Hát Bội Saigon Art Cruise
projects.summary: A floating cultural programme introducing Southern Vietnamese classical theatre through research, dramaturgy and an audience friendly narrative.
projects.outcome: Developed the curatorial frame, performance script, programme information and communication materials.
projects.imageAlt: Hát Bội performance aboard the Saigon Art Cruise

projects.title: Culture Writing for Tatler Vietnam
projects.summary: Reported essays and features spanning art, design, culture and contemporary life for digital and print editions.
projects.outcome: Published 10+ long form essays and cultural features.

projects.title: Brand Copywriting System
projects.summary: Editorial and campaign copy across social media, internal communication, email marketing, landing pages, factsheets and sales materials.
projects.outcome: Built consistent narratives across launch campaigns, ongoing communications and multiple Toong locations.

projects.title: Hidden Champions Show
projects.summary: Research led episode scripts that translate founder journeys and business insight into clear, human conversations.
projects.outcome: Wrote 10+ podcast episodes with more than 100K total views.

projects.title: Lela Journal Editorial Archive
projects.summary: Profiles, interviews, reported features, PR stories, advertorials and editorials centred on people shaping contemporary culture and city life.
projects.outcome: Produced 100+ pieces and achieved 80%+ reader retention across the editorial portfolio.

projects.title: NovelToon Editorial and Community
projects.summary: Fiction development, adaptation scripts, editorial assessment, writing curriculum, social content and author community programmes.
projects.outcome: Managed 120+ novels, supported work reaching 1M+ views, grew the community to 27K followers and trained 120 authors.

projects.title: Books Editing and Translation
projects.summary: Editorial development, print production and translation management across psychology, family, business and coming of age titles.
projects.outcome: Managed and edited 20+ print publications.

projects.title: Cuộc Đua Đầu Thai
projects.summary: A folklore inspired board game concept built around a race board, eight supernatural characters and a playful narrative system.
projects.outcome: Developed the concept, character set, board structure and project presentation as an independent creative experiment.
projects.imageAlt: Race board for Cuộc Đua Đầu Thai

projects.title: Lọng Bướm
projects.summary: An exhibition tracing memory, craft and the transformation of butterfly parasols through contemporary storytelling.
projects.outcome: Created the curatorial narrative, interview direction, landing page and communications.

projects.title: Vàng Sơn Một Thuở
projects.summary: A lacquer focused cultural programme connecting material knowledge, artistic practice and public conversation.
projects.outcome: Developed the programme, exhibition copy, artist context and communications.
projects.imageAlt: Vàng Sơn Một Thuở key visual

projects.title: Người Đơm Hoa Giấy
projects.summary: A documentary exhibition about paper flower makers and the quiet persistence of handcraft in the contemporary city.
projects.outcome: Shaped the research, interviews, exhibition story and public facing copy.
projects.imageAlt: Người Đơm Hoa Giấy exhibition documentation

projects.title: Khơi Gợi Mỹ Cảm
projects.summary: An atelier series creating accessible entry points into Vietnamese art, aesthetic attention and material culture.
projects.outcome: Developed the programme proposal, agenda, editorial framing and communication materials.
projects.imageAlt: Khơi Gợi Mỹ Cảm programme visual

projects.title: Đờn Ca Tài Tử Culture Class
projects.summary: A participatory culture class introducing the forms, instruments and listening practices of Southern Vietnamese chamber music.
projects.outcome: Developed the teaching structure, agenda, supporting copy and event documentation.
projects.imageAlt: Đờn Ca Tài Tử culture class

projects.title: Improv Kịch Ứng Tác
projects.summary: An audience facing improv theatre programme framed through accessible editorial and event communications.
projects.outcome: Produced landing page copy, programme framing and event documentation.

projects.title: Tranh Gói Vải Culture Class
projects.summary: A hands on programme exploring image making and material sensitivity through fabric wrapping practice.
projects.outcome: Developed the programme positioning and public communication.
projects.imageAlt: Tranh Gói Vải culture class visual

projects.title: Toong Thi Sách Launch
projects.summary: A place led launch narrative spanning teaser script, social content, internal communication, email marketing and sales materials.
projects.outcome: Connected heritage, location and product value through one consistent campaign language.

projects.title: Toong The Global City
projects.summary: Brand storytelling and launch copy for a new workplace destination, including TVC script, English factsheet and sales communication.
projects.outcome: Translated the location strategy into concise customer facing narratives across formats.
projects.imageAlt: Toong The Global City English factsheet

projects.title: Client Stories: Kengur, Keyrus and ExoTrail
projects.summary: Business interviews translating client experience, operational context and workplace culture into credible brand stories.
projects.outcome: Developed interview questionnaires, narrative scripts and customer facing profiles for three corporate clients.

projects.title: SEO Editorial for Mybest.vn
projects.summary: Search led product guides spanning mobility, personal finance, beauty and mobile applications.
projects.outcome: Created a portfolio of ranking articles supported by research, comparison frameworks and search intent.

projects.title: Place Narratives and Visual Direction
projects.summary: Campaign concepts and editorial direction across location launches, pop ups and art programmes in Ho Chi Minh City and Hanoi.
projects.outcome: Contributed copy and concept direction across nine location and campaign folders in the working archive.

projects.title: Selected Book Translations
projects.summary: Selected translated titles and editorial work developed for Vietnamese readers across practical nonfiction and general interest publishing.
projects.outcome: Managed language, structure and publication readiness across translated manuscripts.

projects.title: Film Criticism
projects.summary: A selected archive of criticism examining image, narrative, gender and cultural interpretation in cinema.
projects.outcome: Six preserved criticism pieces, including an extended reading of The Shape of Water.

projects.title: E Magazine and Branded Editorial
projects.summary: Digital magazine work spanning travel, gender, communication, business profiles and seasonal culture.
projects.outcome: Six preserved long form and branded editorial editions in the archive.

projects.title: Editorial and Communication Proposals
projects.summary: Strategic proposals turning research, communication objectives and programme structures into clear client narratives.
projects.outcome: Selected work includes an ESG communication plan and cultural programme proposals.

projects.title: People, Ideas and City Life
projects.summary: Interviews with artists, cultural figures, entrepreneurs, doctors, KOLs and specialists, shaped into accessible editorial profiles.
projects.outcome: Built an interview practice within a wider archive of 100+ published pieces.

projects.title: Artist Talks and Cultural Interviews
projects.summary: Question frameworks and conversations that preserve artistic process, craft knowledge and the personal histories behind cultural programmes.
projects.outcome: Developed artist interviews and six selected talk records across the archive.
projects.imageAlt: Artist interview documentation for Lọng Bướm

projects.title: Fiction Adaptation and Writer Training
projects.summary: Character frameworks, adaptation scripts, assessment criteria, editorial guidance and practical writing lessons for serial fiction authors.
projects.outcome: Prepared curriculum and training for 120 authors alongside ongoing fiction development.

timeline.role: Senior Copywriter and Art Event Curator
